## Does it pass the four-question test?

<!-- See docs/principles/values.md -->
- [ ] Is it true / honest?
- [ ] Is it legal and within our word?
- [ ] Does it genuinely serve the person it touches?
- [ ] Would you be proud to explain it to a kid?
